benefits.description: Lost most of the weight they wanted to lose

side_effects.description: Huge raised welts at injection sites that itch intensely and last over a week even with antihistamines; tried rotating sites, diluting, room temp, different BAC, changed suppliers
Hair loss, had to force themselves to eat

protocol_notes: OP is considering switching from Reta to Tirz due to skin allergy. Tried many mitigation strategies for injection site reactions. Notes they have lost most of their target weight.
